green.use: pale green — main brand surface (covers, heroes, social tiles); sampled from official 2025 Instagram materials

green-dark.use: hover states, small accents on white (derived shade)

yellow.use: accent squares / highlights only — never running text

black.use: logo on light, body text, headings

white.use: logo on green/dark, text on green, page background

auxiliary_brandbook_2023.note: Muted tints from the 2023 brandbook; backgrounds only, use sparingly.
auxiliary_brandbook_2023.black-tints: 70% / 50% / 25% of black allowed; matte silver & matte gold only for special occasions

fonts.display: Q3 DIN Condensed (fonts/Q3_DIN_Condensed.ttf) — headings, UPPERCASE; fallback Arial Narrow / Calibri Bold
fonts.body: Calibri; fallback 'Segoe UI', Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif
fonts.note: Logo wordmark typeface ships inside the logo art — never recreate it with fonts.
